name: Buckhorn Lake Resort
description: Buckhorn Lake Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kerrville, TX. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: H.E.B. Municipal Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at H.E.B. Municipal Tennis Center in Kerrville, TX! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $5 a person to play

name: Kerrville First United Methodist Church (KFUMC)
description: Kerrville First United Methodist Church (KFUMC) is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kerrville, TX. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Kroc Center
description: Come play pickleball at Kroc Center in Kerrville, TX! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Schreiner University
description: Park next to the sand volleyball courts.
